ddls:
CREATE TABLE "ethnic_groups" (
  "ethnic_group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ethnic group */,
  "ethnic_group_name" TEXT /* Name of the ethnic group */,
  "ethnic_group_code" TEXT /* Code or abbreviation for the ethnic group */,
  "ethnic_group_description" TEXT /* Description of the ethnic group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ethnic_group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "region_code" TEXT /* Code or abbreviation for the region */,
  "region_description" TEXT /* Description of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "time_periods" (
  "time_period_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each time period */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the time period */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the time period */,
  "period_description" TEXT /* Description of the time period */,
  "time_period_type" TEXT /* Type of time period (e.g., weekly, monthly, quarterly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("time_period_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographic_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data record */,
  "ethnic_group_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the ethnic group */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region */,
  "time_period_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the time period */,
  "population_count" INTEGER /* Population count for the specified ethnic group, region, and time period */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source */,
  "data_collection_method" TEXT /* Method used to collect the data (e.g., survey, census) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographic_data_ethnic_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("ethnic_group_id") REFERENCES ethnic_groups ("ethnic_group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographic_data_time_period_id FOREIGN KEY ("time_period_id") REFERENCES time_periods ("time_period_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographic_data_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of data source (e.g., government, survey, administrative) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_source_details" (
  "detail_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source detail record */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the demographic data record */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "source_file" TEXT /* File path to the source data file */,
  "source_date" TEXT /* Date the data was collected from the source */,
  "data_collection_date" TEXT /* Date the data was collected */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("detail_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_source_details_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES demographic_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_source_details_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the demographic data record being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_purpose" TEXT /* Purpose of access (e.g., research, analysis) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES demographic_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_description" TEXT /* Description of the report */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the report */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the report was created */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., weekly, monthly, ad-hoc) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_contents" (
  "content_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report content entry */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the demographic data used in the report */,
  "content_type" TEXT /* Type of content (e.g., chart, table, text) */,
  "content_text" TEXT /* Text content or description of the content */,
  "content_format" TEXT /* Format of the content (e.g., pdf, csv, excel) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("content_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_contents_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES demographic_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_contents_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_validations" (
  "validation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each validation rule */,
  "rule_name" TEXT /* Name of the validation rule */,
  "rule_description" TEXT /* Description of the validation rule */,
  "rule_expression" TEXT /* Expression used to validate the data */,
  "rule_type" TEXT /* Type of validation (e.g., range, format) */,
  "validation_level" TEXT /* Level of validation (e.g., warning, error) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("validation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "validation_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each validation log entry */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the demographic data record being validated */,
  "validation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the validation rule */,
  "validation_date" TEXT /* Date the validation was performed */,
  "validation_result" TEXT /* Result of the validation (e.g., pass, fail) */,
  "validation_message" TEXT /* Message describing the validation result */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_validation_logs_validation_id FOREIGN KEY ("validation_id") REFERENCES data_validations ("validation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_validation_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES demographic_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log entry */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the demographic data record that was changed */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date the change was made */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., insert, update, delete) */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES demographic_data ("data_id")
)
